name: 7 Days to Die
author: ops@refx.example
description: Open-world voxel survival horror. SteamCMD-installed dedicated server driven by serverconfig.xml.

installScript.script:
#!/bin/bash
# ReFx steamcmd shim — the steamcmd:debian/proton install image ships no
# `steamcmd` on PATH. Bootstrap SteamCMD and expose it on PATH so the egg's
# `steamcmd ...` calls resolve (otherwise the game server never downloads).
if ! command -v steamcmd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
  curl -sSL https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz | tar zxf - -C /mnt/server/steamcmd || { echo "ERROR: failed to fetch steamcmd"; exit 1; }
  chmod +x /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamcmd 2>/dev/null || true
  printf '#!/bin/sh\nexec /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
  chmod +x /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
fi
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server
steamcmd +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login anonymous +app_update 294420 validate +quit
# Apply panel settings to the shipped serverconfig.xml (set the <property> values).
if [ -f /mnt/server/serverconfig.xml ]; then
  esc() { printf '%s' "$1" | sed -e 's/[&\\#]/\\&/g'; }
  setp() { sed -i -E "s#(<property name=\"$1\" value=\")[^\"]*#\\1$(esc "$2")#" /mnt/server/serverconfig.xml; }
  setp ServerName "${SERVER_NAME}"
  setp ServerMaxPlayerCount "${MAX_PLAYERS}"
  setp ServerPassword "${SERVER_PASSWORD}"
  setp GameDifficulty "${GAME_DIFFICULTY}"
  setp WorldGenSeed "${WORLD_GEN_SEED}"
fi
echo '7 Days to Die install complete.'

variables.description: Name shown in the in-game server browser.
Leave blank for a public server.
Seed used to generate a RWG world.

longDescription: Scavenge, craft and fortify against the seventh-day horde on your own 7 Days to Die server.
